2025 in one line

"No other conference with such a unique group of stakeholders."

2025 WHN attendee

Scroll
$1B+Worth of capital managed by 2025 attendees
200+Attendees across healthcare, capital & policy
6Hours of curated programming
5Featured panels on innovation, capital & policy

Women's health is one of the largest untapped opportunities in healthcare today.

Yet the investors, clinicians, founders, and policymakers who can change this rarely sit in the same room. WHN was built to put these groups together — and turn proximity into progress.

Women's Health Nexus was built to put these groups in the same room, and turn proximity into progress.
  • InvestmentContinues to accelerate, with growing institutional and corporate interest across the sector.
  • PolicyFederal and state leaders are prioritizing maternal health, longevity, access, and health equity.
  • Health SystemsAre actively searching for scalable, evidence-based solutions to longstanding gaps in care delivery.
  • FoundersAre building the technologies and care models that can genuinely transform outcomes for women.

A full day of curated content across three pillars

Every session is built around the people shaping the sector — not a single-track agenda, but a working day for the whole ecosystem.

Pillar One

Innovation

  • Women's health tech
  • Digital health
  • AI in healthcare
  • Diagnostics
  • Care delivery
Pillar Two

Policy & Care

  • Federal policy
  • Reimbursement
  • Hospital leadership
  • Clinical innovation
  • Health access
Pillar Three

Capital

  • Investment trends
  • Funding pathways
  • Corporate partnerships
  • Growth strategy
  • Healthcare VC

Decision-makers from every corner of the women's health ecosystem

Healthcare VC firm owners & family offices

Healthcare law firms & domain experts
Health-tech founders & operators
Researchers & academic leaders
Angel investors & strategic investors
Policymakers & federal agency leaders

Apply to pitch — and be recognized at WHN 2026

A limited number of early-stage women's health companies will be selected for recognition at this year's conference, presenting directly to the investors, health systems, and policymakers in the room. Screening is by application only.

Apply to Pitch →

Partnership tiers for every level of engagement

Opportunities are limited and secured on a first-come, first-served basis. The Founding Partnership is exclusive to one organization.

Exclusive — 1 Available

Founding Partner

$50,000
  • Presenting partner rights — "WHN 2026, Presented by [Sponsor]"
  • Executive speaking slot (keynote or fireside chat)
  • Premier logo across all assets
  • Hosted introductions to curated attendees
  • 15 passes incl. VIP reception & speaker dinner
  • Featured content partnership
  • Year-round digital visibility
  • VIP Investor Brunch access

Congressional Country Club

A landmark Bethesda estate with a century of championship history — the backdrop for WHN's most consequential conversations, and for the relationships that follow them.

Bethesda, Maryland · November 5, 2026

200+ leaders, one room, a full day of substantive conversation.

From fireside chats to investor receptions, WHN 2025 set the standard for what a working conference in women's health should feel like — candid, senior, and built for follow-through.
